Description: Define color palette (primary, secondary, semantic), typography scale, spacing system, border radius, shadow tokens. Export as Figma variables.
UX Flow: N/A — foundational work before any screens
Dev Handoff Notes: Devs need tokens as CSS custom properties. Agree on naming convention: --color-primary-500 format. Must cover: default, hover, active, disabled, error, success states for all interactive elements.

Description: Button (5 variants × 4 sizes × 5 states), Input, Textarea, Select, Checkbox, Radio, Toggle, Badge, Spinner, Toast, Modal shell, Tooltip
UX Flow: N/A — library work
Dev Handoff Notes: Each component needs ALL states designed: default, hover, focus, active, disabled, loading, error. Devs will implement 1:1 — missing states = missing implementation. Export as Figma component set with auto-layout.

Description: Header (logged-out / logged-in buyer / logged-in seller / admin), Sidebar, Footer, Page shell, Notification bell + dropdown
UX Flow: Header state changes based on auth role. Notification bell shows unread count badge.
Dev Handoff Notes: Header: 4 variants (guest, buyer, seller, admin). Notification dropdown: empty state, 1-5 items, 5+ items with scroll. Mobile responsive breakpoints: 375, 768, 1280, 1440px.

Description: Step 1: Choose role (Buyer / Seller / Service Provider). Step 2: Enter name, email, phone, password. Step 3: OTP verification. Step 4: Success + onboarding prompt.
UX Flow: User lands on /register → selects role → fills form → receives OTP to phone → enters OTP → account active → redirected to dashboard or company setup
Dev Handoff Notes: States needed: form validation errors per field, OTP resend countdown timer, OTP incorrect error, OTP expired state, success animation. Mobile: full-screen OTP input.

Description: Email+password form. Forgot password flow (enter phone/email → OTP → new password → success).
UX Flow: User enters credentials → submit → success goes to dashboard / failure shows inline error. Forgot password: 3-step modal or separate page.
Dev Handoff Notes: Error states: wrong password (with attempt counter after 3 fails), account not verified, account banned (with reason). Forgot password: OTP input same component as registration.

Description: Post-registration prompt to set up company. БИН input with format hint. Company name, address, type. Document upload (БИН certificate, charter, director ID). Submission confirmation + pending state.
UX Flow: New seller/service-provider registers → prompted to set up company → fills company details → uploads documents → sees pending verification status → gets notified when verified
Dev Handoff Notes: БИН field: format mask 123456789012 (12 digits), inline validation, KZ-specific hint text. Document upload: supports PDF+image, show file name + size + remove option. Pending state: progress indicator showing steps completed.

Description: Main catalog grid. Category navigation. Featured listings. Search bar prominent. Filters sidebar. Equipment card component. Pagination / infinite scroll.
UX Flow: User lands on homepage → sees featured equipment + categories → can filter/search immediately without login → clicks card → goes to detail
Dev Handoff Notes: Equipment card states: normal, hover (elevation), favorited, sold/unavailable overlay, 'price dropped' badge. Empty state for empty category. Skeleton loading state for initial load. Mobile: 1-col grid with compact card.

Description: Media gallery (photo + video). Technical specs table. Seller info card. Price display (sale or rental terms). CTA buttons (Contact Seller / Make Offer / Rent). Availability calendar for rentals. Similar equipment carousel.
UX Flow: User clicks listing → detail page loads → views photos → checks specs → sees seller rating → clicks CTA → login gate if not auth'd → redirect to deal flow
Dev Handoff Notes: Gallery: lightbox on click, video play inline, thumbnail strip. Specs: scrollable table on mobile, expand/collapse long lists. CTA sticky on mobile scroll. Availability calendar: green/red/grey slots. Seller card: verified badge, rating stars, response rate.

Description: Search results grid/list toggle. Filter panel (collapsible on mobile). Active filters chips. Sort dropdown. Result count. No-results state with suggestions.
UX Flow: User types query → results update → user applies filters → results narrow → user toggles list/grid view → clicks result → goes to detail
Dev Handoff Notes: Filter panel: sticky on desktop, bottom sheet on mobile. Active filter chips: removable individually + clear all. Sort: price asc/desc, newest, relevance. No results: show similar categories, clear filters CTA, contact support link.

Description: Category tree navigation. Sub-category cards with equipment count. Breadcrumb. Category-specific filter attributes (crane vs compressor have different spec filters).
UX Flow: User clicks category → sees sub-categories or filtered results → breadcrumb shows path → can go back to parent
Dev Handoff Notes: Category icons/illustrations per type. Equipment count badge on each category card. Dynamic filter panel changes attributes based on selected category.

Description: Side-by-side table of up to 4 equipment items. Highlight differences. Add/remove items. Sticky header with equipment photos.
UX Flow: User adds items to compare from listing pages → navigates to /compare → sees normalized spec table → differences highlighted → clicks CTA on preferred item
Dev Handoff Notes: Difference highlighting: non-matching cells get visual treatment (color tint). Empty column if < 4 items selected. Mobile: horizontal scroll. Max 4 items enforced with tooltip on 5th attempt.

Description: Grid of favorited listings. Price change indicators (↑↓ with delta). Collection tabs. Remove from favorites. Empty state.
UX Flow: User clicks heart on any listing → added to default watchlist → user views /favorites → sees all saved items → price drop badge shown if price decreased since favorited
Dev Handoff Notes: Price change indicator: green arrow down + delta amount for drops, grey arrow up for increases. 'Price dropped since you saved' toast. Empty state: illustration + CTA to browse catalog.

Description: Full-screen category picker. Search within categories. Visual category cards with icons. Breadcrumb navigation.
UX Flow: Seller clicks 'Post listing' → must be verified company → step 1: pick category → step 2: fill specs → step 3: upload media → step 4: pricing → step 5: review → submit
Dev Handoff Notes: Category search: instant filter as user types. Visual hierarchy: industry → type → sub-type. Selected state clearly visible. Back button always available.

Description: Dynamic form rendered from category schema. Text, number, dropdown, multi-select field types. Required field indicators. Condition selector (new/used). Year, manufacturer fields.
UX Flow: After category selected → form fields dynamically change to match category schema (crane fields ≠ compressor fields) → validation inline as user fills
Dev Handoff Notes: Dynamic form: fields appear/disappear based on category. Number inputs with unit labels (kW, kg, m). Required fields marked. Progress indicator showing step 2/5. Auto-save draft.

Task Name: Listing Creation Wizard — Step 3: Media Upload
Description: Drag-and-drop upload zone. Image reorder (drag handles). Video upload option. Progress bars. Thumbnail previews. Primary photo selector.
UX Flow: User drags photos onto zone or clicks to browse → photos upload to MinIO directly → thumbnails show with progress → user reorders → selects primary → next
Dev Handoff Notes: Upload states: idle, dragging-over, uploading (progress bar per file), success, error (retry). Min 1 photo required enforcement. Max 20 photos. Video: 1 max, size warning. Reorder via drag. Primary photo marked with star.

Task Name: Listing Creation Wizard — Steps 4–5: Pricing & Review
Description: Sale price OR rental pricing (daily/weekly/monthly rates). Negotiable toggle. Location picker. Availability date range for rentals. Final review screen before submit.
UX Flow: User sets price → optionally sets rental periods → picks location on 2GIS map picker → review all entered data → submit → moderation pending state
Dev Handoff Notes: Price: sale vs rental toggle changes fields. Rental: multiple rate tiers (day/week/month). Location: map picker with 2GIS, or manual address input. Review: all data shown read-only with edit links per section. Submit: loading state → success with listing ID.

Description: Table/list of own listings. Status badges (draft, pending, active, archived). View count. Quick actions: edit, deactivate, boost. Stats summary cards at top.
UX Flow: Seller visits /account/listings → sees all their listings → can filter by status → clicks listing → edits or views stats
Dev Handoff Notes: Status badges: color-coded. View count with sparkline. Empty state for new sellers. Bulk actions (deactivate selected). Stats at top: total active, total views this month, pending moderation.

Task Name: Deal Initiation — Contact Seller / Make Offer
Description: Modal or side panel triggered from listing detail. Message field. Offer price input (if making offer). Rental date picker (if rental). Submit CTA.
UX Flow: Buyer clicks CTA on listing → modal opens → fills message and/or price → submits → deal created → redirected to deals inbox → chat opened automatically
Dev Handoff Notes: Login gate: if not logged in, trigger auth modal then return. Date picker: range selector for rentals, validate against availability calendar. Success: deal created confirmation with link to deal page.

Description: Split view (or list on mobile): deal list on left, deal detail on right. Tabs: As Buyer / As Seller. Status filter. Deal cards with equipment thumb, counterparty, status badge, last activity.
UX Flow: User navigates to /deals → sees all deals → filters by role (buyer/seller) → clicks deal → sees detail on right → takes actions
Dev Handoff Notes: Deal card states: new inquiry (highlighted), awaiting response, confirmed, payment pending, in progress, completed, cancelled, disputed. Unread indicator. Empty state per tab.

Description: Deal timeline (vertical stepper). Equipment snapshot (price, photo, name — frozen at deal creation). Buyer + seller info. Action buttons contextual to status + role. Payment status. Document links. Chat CTA.
UX Flow: Buyer or seller clicks deal → sees full deal detail → timeline shows history → takes available action based on their role and current status
Dev Handoff Notes: Timeline: each status change is a node with timestamp and actor. Action buttons: only show actions valid for current user's role at current status. Payment block: shows amount, method, status. Documents: list with download links. Mobile: tabbed layout (Overview / Timeline / Documents / Chat).

Description: Payment initiation screen (amount, method selection: Kaspi/Halyk). Redirect to provider. Return screens: success, failure, pending.
UX Flow: Deal confirmed → payment initiated → user selects Kaspi or Halyk → redirected to provider page → returns to platform → success/failure screen shown
Dev Handoff Notes: Payment method selector: Kaspi logo vs Halyk logo cards. Amount breakdown: equipment price + platform commission + any service fees. Success: confirmation with deal ID, next steps. Failure: reason if available, retry button, contact support link.

Description: Modal triggered post-deal completion. Rating sliders per dimension (reliability, condition, communication). Text comment. Anonymous option. Submit.
UX Flow: Deal marked complete → 7-day window to review → banner shown in deal page → click 'Leave review' → modal → submit → score updates on counterparty profile
Dev Handoff Notes: Rating: 1–5 stars per dimension, not just one overall. Character count on comment (max 500). Already reviewed state (show submitted review). Review prompt: appears as banner 24h after deal completion, reminder notification after 3 days.

Description: Company name, logo, verified badge, description. Rating breakdown (overall + per dimension). Reviews list with pagination. Active listings preview. Member since. Response rate.
UX Flow: User clicks seller name on listing or deal → navigates to company profile → sees trust signals → browses their listings
Dev Handoff Notes: Verified badge: prominent, tooltip explaining what verification means. Rating: star display + numeric + review count. Reviews: most recent first, filterable by rating. Empty review state for new companies.

Description: Full chat interface. Message bubbles (own right / other left). Timestamps. Read receipts (✓✓). Typing indicator. File attachment. Emoji (optional). Deal info sidebar.
UX Flow: Buyer and seller are in a deal → click 'Open chat' → chat window opens tied to that deal → messages in real time → offline messages shown on reconnect
Dev Handoff Notes: Message states: sent (✓), delivered (✓✓), read (✓✓ blue). Long messages: full display, no truncation in chat. File attachments: image preview inline, other files as download card. Typing indicator: animated dots. Deal info sidebar: collapsible, shows deal status + quick actions. Mobile: full screen, deal info in top bar.

Description: List of all active conversations. Last message preview. Unread count badge. Equipment thumbnail. Counterparty name + verified badge. Status of associated deal.
UX Flow: User navigates to /chat → sees all conversations → unread ones highlighted → clicks → opens chat window
Dev Handoff Notes: Unread: bold text + count badge. Last message preview: truncated to 1 line, show media attachment icon if last message was file. Empty state: 'Start a deal to begin chatting'. Search conversations by counterparty name.

Description: Full notifications page. Grouped by date (Today, Yesterday, This week). Notification types with distinct icons. Mark all read. Notification preferences settings link.
UX Flow: User clicks bell → sees dropdown preview (latest 5) → clicks 'See all' → full page feed → each notification links to relevant entity
Dev Handoff Notes: Notification types need distinct visual treatment: deal update, payment, message, price drop, company verified, moderation. Unread vs read visual state. Group actions: mark all read. Infinite scroll. Empty state.

Description: Toggle matrix: notification types (rows) × channels (push / SMS / email) (columns). Save button. Explanation of each notification type.
UX Flow: User goes to account settings → notification preferences → toggles channels per event type → saves
Dev Handoff Notes: Some notifications should not be toggleable (security alerts, payment confirmations). Visual grouping: deal notifications, platform notifications, marketing. Explain each with plain language description.

Description: Stats cards (views, contacts, conversion, GMV). Charts: views over time, deal funnel. Listing performance table. Date range selector. Market price comparison widget.
UX Flow: Seller navigates to /account/analytics → sees performance summary → selects date range → drills into listing-level stats
Dev Handoff Notes: Charts: line chart for views over time, funnel chart for deal stages, bar chart for top listings. Date range: last 7 / 30 / 90 days + custom. Market price: 'Your price vs market average' bar comparison. Mobile: scroll through stat cards, charts full-width.

Task Name: Price History Chart on Listing Page
Description: Inline chart on listing detail showing price over time. 'Price dropped X% since listing' callout. Market average line overlay.
UX Flow: User viewing listing → scrolls to price section → sees price history chart → understands price trend before making offer
Dev Handoff Notes: Chart: line chart, 90-day default view. Market average: dashed line overlay. Price drop callout: highlighted annotation on drop point. Minimal, doesn't distract from main CTA.

Description: Service provider cards (logistics, installation, maintenance, insurance). Filter by type and region. Service detail page. Order/contact flow.
UX Flow: User in deal flow sees 'Add services' CTA → browses service providers → selects logistics provider → books delivery → linked to deal
Dev Handoff Notes: Service cards: different icon per type, rating, price range, service area. Service detail: description, pricing table, past work photos, reviews. Order flow: similar to deal initiation.

Description: Plan comparison table (Free / Basic / Pro / Enterprise). Feature checklist per plan. Current plan highlighted. Upgrade CTA. Billing history.
UX Flow: Seller navigates to /account/subscription → sees plans → compares features → clicks upgrade → payment flow → plan activated → listing limits increased
Dev Handoff Notes: Plan cards: vertical comparison table. Feature rows: listing limit, featured placements, analytics access, commission rate, support level. Current plan: highlighted with 'Current' badge. Upgrade: inline payment or redirect to payment flow. Billing history: invoice list with download.

Description: Dispute form: reason selector, description, evidence upload. Confirmation screen. Dispute status page.
UX Flow: Buyer or seller in active deal sees issue → clicks 'File dispute' → selects reason → describes issue → uploads evidence → submits → dispute status shown in deal page
Dev Handoff Notes: Reason selector: predefined types (equipment not as described, non-delivery, payment issue, other). Evidence upload: same component as listing media upload. Warning: filing dispute pauses deal and escrow. Status page: filed → under review → resolved with decision shown.

Description: Split view: listing queue left, preview right. Approve/reject buttons. Rejection reason modal. Filter by category, date, seller. Stats: items in queue, avg review time.
UX Flow: Admin logs in → separate admin layout → sees moderation queue → clicks listing → reviews content → approves or rejects with reason → next item
Dev Handoff Notes: Listing preview: all content visible without leaving queue. Approve: one click, green confirmation. Reject: required reason from predefined list + optional custom note. Keyboard shortcuts hint. Batch approve (after single review).

Description: Queue of pending companies. Document viewer (PDF inline, image zoom). Company info panel. Approve/reject with notes. History of previous decisions.
UX Flow: Admin sees verification queue → clicks company → views submitted documents inline → checks БИН format → approves or requests additional docs → company notified
Dev Handoff Notes: Document viewer: PDF rendered inline (no download required to review). Image: zoomable. Multiple documents: tabbed. Notes: visible to company owner after decision. Flag for follow-up option.

Description: KPI cards (GMV, active users, listings, open disputes). Charts: GMV over time, new registrations, deal funnel. Regional heatmap (KZ map). Top categories table.
UX Flow: Admin goes to /admin/analytics → sees platform health overview → can filter by date range → drills into specific metric
Dev Handoff Notes: KZ map: oblast-level heat by listing density or GMV. Charts: consistent style with seller analytics. Real-time counters for active users, open disputes. Export data as CSV button.

Description: Design empty states for every major screen: no listings, no deals, no messages, no notifications, no search results, no favorites, no reviews.
UX Flow: User encounters empty state → sees illustration + clear explanation + relevant CTA
Dev Handoff Notes: Each empty state: custom illustration (not generic), 1-line explanation, 1 CTA. Consistent illustration style across all. No lorem ipsum — real copy in RU.

Description: 404 page, 500 page, network error, session expired, permission denied, maintenance mode screens.
UX Flow: User hits broken link → 404 page → back to home CTA. API fails → inline error with retry. Session expires → modal asking to re-login (preserve current page state).
Dev Handoff Notes: All error messages in plain language (no technical codes shown to users). Retry mechanisms visible. Support contact link on persistent errors.

Description: Review and fix all screens at 375px (iPhone SE), 390px (iPhone 14), 768px (iPad). Document breakpoint behavior for dev handoff.
UX Flow: User opens site on mobile → all layouts adapt → no horizontal scroll → touch targets ≥ 44px → bottom navigation on mobile
Dev Handoff Notes: Touch targets: minimum 44×44px. Bottom nav on mobile for main sections. Forms: full-width inputs, large tap targets. Modals: bottom sheets on mobile. Tables: horizontal scroll with frozen first column.

Description: Final pass: all components have all states, correct auto-layout, exported with correct naming for dev handoff. Component descriptions filled in Figma.
UX Flow: N/A — library work
Dev Handoff Notes: All components: variants panel complete, no detached instances in screens, description field filled with usage guidance. Name all layers properly — devs use these names as CSS class references.

Description: Review all screens with Kazakh text (longer strings than RU). Fix overflow issues, truncation, layout breaks caused by longer text.
UX Flow: User switches to KK language → all text switches → no layout breaks
Dev Handoff Notes: Kazakh words average 30-40% longer than Russian. Check: button labels, nav items, form labels, card titles, tab labels. All must wrap or truncate gracefully.
